name: X Bookmarks
description: Your saved X (Twitter) bookmarks, synced into Trove. Reads GET /2/users/:id/bookmarks (your ~800 most recent, newest-first) via OAuth 2.0 user-context with the bookmark.read scope. Reads three credentials from ctx.credentials: X_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID, X_OAUTH_REFRESH_TOKEN, and (for a confidential client) the optional X_OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET. Currently unavailable: it needs a one-time OAuth authorize step (scripts/x-authorize.mjs) plus rotating-refresh-token management we can't collect through the app yet.
author: Hollyburn Analytics Inc.
